_meta.instructions: Fill in the "translation" field for each key below. Translate from English to Danish. Do not change the key names. Return the completed file to add translations back into the app.

home.tagline.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
home.tagline.translation: Ekspertise inden for premium forbrugsvarer siden 2019

home.brandStatement.en: A leading global consumer goods company delivering premium food products across diverse categories with international quality standards.
home.brandStatement.translation: En førende global virksomhed inden for forbrugsvarer, der leverer premium fødevarer på tværs af forskellige kategorier med internationale kvalitetsstandarder.

home.taglineStart.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since
home.taglineStart.translation: Ekspertise inden for premium forbrugsvarer siden

products.discoverPremium.en: Discover our premium range of products crafted with care and excellence.
products.discoverPremium.translation: Oplev vores førsteklasses udvalg af produkter, der er fremstillet med omhu og ekspertise.

products.noSubcategories.en: No subcategories available for this category.
products.noSubcategories.translation: Ingen underkategorier tilgængelige for denne kategori.

products.snacksDesc.en: Tasty snacks for any time of day.
products.snacksDesc.translation: Lækre snacks til enhver tid af dagen.

about.subtitle.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
about.subtitle.translation: Ekspertise inden for premium forbrugsvarer siden 2019

about.story1.en: Founded in 2019, Harvics has grown from a visionary idea into a global leader in premium consumer goods. Our journey is defined by a relentless pursuit of quality and a commitment to innovation.
about.story1.translation: Harvics blev grundlagt i 2019 og har udviklet sig fra en visionær idé til en global leder inden for premium forbrugsvarer. Vores rejse er defineret af en utrættelig stræben efter kvalitet og et engagement i innovation.

about.story2.en: We operate across 40+ countries, delivering products that enrich lives and set new standards in the industry. From our humble beginnings to our global presence, our values remain unchanged.
about.story2.translation: Vi opererer i over 40 lande og leverer produkter, der beriger liv og sætter nye standarder i branchen. Fra vores ydmyge begyndelse til vores globale tilstedeværelse er vores værdier uændrede.

csr.hero.description.en: At Harvics, we are committed to making a positive impact on the world. Our CSR initiatives focus on sustainability, community empowerment, and ethical business practices.
csr.hero.description.translation: Hos Harvics er vi forpligtet til at gøre en positiv forskel på verden. Vores CSR-initiativer fokuserer på bæredygtighed, samfundsstyrkelse og etisk forretningspraksis.

csr.initiatives.description.en: We focus on four main pillars to drive sustainable change and create shared value for all stakeholders.
csr.initiatives.description.translation: Vi fokuserer på fire hovedsøjler for at drive bæredygtig forandring og skabe fælles værdi for alle interessenter.

csr.sustainability.description.en: Reducing our environmental footprint through renewable energy and waste reduction.
csr.sustainability.description.translation: Reducere vores miljømæssige fodaftryk gennem vedvarende energi og affaldsreduktion.

csr.community.description.en: Empowering local communities through education, healthcare, and economic development.
csr.community.description.translation: Styrkelse af lokalsamfund gennem uddannelse, sundhedspleje og økonomisk udvikling.

csr.education.description.en: Providing access to quality education and scholarships for underprivileged students.
csr.education.description.translation: At give adgang til kvalitetsuddannelse og stipendier til underprivilegerede studerende.

csr.health.description.en: Improving access to healthcare and nutrition in underserved regions.
csr.health.description.translation: Forbedring af adgangen til sundhedspleje og ernæring i underforsynede regioner.

csr.achievements.2022.description.en: Honored for our innovative approach to social responsibility.
csr.achievements.2022.description.translation: Hædret for vores innovative tilgang til socialt ansvar.

csr.achievements.2023.description.en: Awarded for our extensive community outreach programs.
csr.achievements.2023.description.translation: Tildelt for vores omfattende opsøgende programmer i lokalsamfundet.

csr.achievements.2024.description.en: Recognized for our commitment to carbon neutrality.
csr.achievements.2024.description.translation: Anerkendt for vores engagement i CO2-neutralitet.

csr.achievements.description.en: Recognizing our milestones in creating a better world.
csr.achievements.description.translation: Anerkendelse af vores milepæle i at skabe en bedre verden.

csr.cta.title.en: Join Us in Making a Difference
csr.cta.title.translation: Vær med os og gør en forskel

csr.cta.description.en: Partner with us or learn more about how we are building a sustainable future.
csr.cta.description.translation: Bliv partner med os, eller lær mere om, hvordan vi bygger en bæredygtig fremtid.

contact.subtitle.en: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us through any of these channels.
contact.subtitle.translation: Vi vil meget gerne høre fra dig. Kontakt os via en af disse kanaler.

media.description.en: Press resources, brand assets, and the latest news from Harvics Global Ventures.
media.description.translation: Presseressourcer, brandaktiver og de seneste nyheder fra Harvics Global Ventures.

media.sections.news.desc.en: Latest announcements, market expansions, product launches, and corporate updates from Harvics Global Ventures.
media.sections.news.desc.translation: Seneste meddelelser, markedsudvidelser, produktlanceringer og virksomhedsopdateringer fra Harvics Global Ventures.

media.sections.gallery.desc.en: High-resolution brand assets, product photography, facility images, and event coverage for media use.
media.sections.gallery.desc.translation: Brandmaterialer i høj opløsning, produktfotografering, billeder af faciliteter og eventdækning til mediebrug.

media.sections.contacts.desc.en: Reach our communications team for press inquiries, interview requests, and partnership announcements.
media.sections.contacts.desc.translation: Kontakt vores kommunikationsteam for pressehenvendelser, interviewanmodninger og partnerskabsmeddelelser.

media.headlines.expansion.en: Harvics Expands FMCG Operations to 5 New Southeast Asian Markets
media.headlines.expansion.translation: Harvics udvider FMCG-aktiviteter til 5 nye sydøstasiatiske markeder

media.headlines.aiPlatform.en: New AI-Powered Supply Chain Platform Launched for Global Distribution
media.headlines.aiPlatform.translation: Ny AI-drevet forsyningskædeplatform lanceret til global distribution

media.headlines.carbonNeutral.en: Harvics Achieves Carbon-Neutral Milestone Across All Facilities
media.headlines.carbonNeutral.translation: Harvics når CO2-neutral milepæl på tværs af alle faciliteter

media.headlines.partnership.en: Strategic Partnership with Leading Textile Manufacturers in South Asia
media.headlines.partnership.translation: Strategisk partnerskab med førende tekstilproducenter i Sydasien

harvicsHouse.subtitle.en: A Legacy of Excellence and Tradition
harvicsHouse.subtitle.translation: En arv af ekspertise og tradition

harvicsHouse.description.en: Harvics House represents the pinnacle of our commitment to quality and heritage. Here, we bring together the finest selection of our premium products, showcased in an environment that reflects our values of elegance, tradition, and innovation.
harvicsHouse.description.translation: Harvics House repræsenterer toppen af vores engagement i kvalitet og kulturarv. Her samler vi det fineste udvalg af vores premiumprodukter, præsenteret i et miljø, der afspejler vores værdier om elegance, tradition og innovation.

harvicsHouse.description2.en: Explore our exclusive collections and discover the story behind every product that bears the Harvics name.
harvicsHouse.description2.translation: Udforsk vores eksklusive kollektioner og opdag historien bag hvert produkt, der bærer navnet Harvics.

footer.tagline.en: Excellence in Premium Consumer Goods Since 2019
footer.tagline.translation: Ekspertise inden for premium forbrugsvarer siden 2019

footer.brandStatement.en: A leading global consumer goods company delivering premium food products across diverse categories with international quality standards.
footer.brandStatement.translation: En førende global virksomhed inden for forbrugsvarer, der leverer premium fødevarer på tværs af forskellige kategorier med internationale kvalitetsstandarder.

footer.subscribeToAlerts.en: Subscribe to receive alerts and updates
footer.subscribeToAlerts.translation: Abonner for at modtage advarsler og opdateringer

footer.speakUp.en: Speak up if you have concerns about compliance or ethics
footer.speakUp.translation: Sig fra, hvis du har bekymringer om compliance eller etik

footer.contactDescription.en: Get in touch with our team

search.placeholder.translation: Søg efter produkter, mærker eller kategorier

chatbot.welcome.en: Hello! How can I help you today?
chatbot.welcome.translation: Hej! Hvordan kan jeg hjælpe dig i dag?

chatbot.fallback.default.en: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you please rephrase?
chatbot.fallback.default.translation: Undskyld, jeg forstod det ikke. Kan du omformulere det?

chatbot.fallback.help.en: I can help you with product information, orders, or general inquiries. What would you like to know?
chatbot.fallback.help.translation: Jeg kan hjælpe dig med produktinformation, ordrer eller generelle forespørgsler. Hvad vil du gerne vide?

chatbot.fallback.contact.en: For more assistance, please contact us at support@harvics.com or call +1-800-HARVICS.
chatbot.fallback.contact.translation: For yderligere hjælp, kontakt os venligst på support@harvics.com eller ring +1-800-HARVICS.

globalWorld.form.emailInvalid.en: Please enter a valid email address

globalWorld.form.marketingConsent.en: I agree to receive marketing communications and updates
globalWorld.form.marketingConsent.translation: Jeg accepterer at modtage markedsføringsmateriale og opdateringer

distributorPortal.dashboard.aiAutomation.en: Auto-approval, stock replenishment, and invoice reminders enabled
distributorPortal.dashboard.aiAutomation.translation: Automatisk godkendelse, lageropfyldning og fakturapåmindelser aktiveret

distributorPortal.dashboard.aiRecommenda.en: Based on credit utilization and payment history

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.translation: Luk alle udestående klager inden for 48 timer.

distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.en: Trigger replenishment for low-stock SKUs (auto-create PO).
distributorPortal.dashboard.actions.play.translation: Udløs genopfyldning for SKU'er med lav lagerbeholdning (automatisk opret indkøbsordre).

distributorPortal.newOrder.noItems.en: No items added yet. Click "Add Item" to start.
distributorPortal.newOrder.noItems.translation: Ingen elementer tilføjet endnu. Klik på "Tilføj element" for at starte.

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.it.en: At least one order item is required

distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.da.en: Delivery date cannot be in the past
distributorPortal.newOrder.validation.da.translation: Leveringsdatoen må ikke være i fortiden

legal.accessDeniedMessage.translation: Du har ikke tilladelse til at få adgang til Legal OS-modulet.

legal.dashboardPage.description.translation: Oversigt over juridiske aktiviteter og compliance-status

legal.trademarks.errors.saveFailed.translation: Varemærket kunne ikke gemmes. Prøv igen.

legal.legalCases.description.en: Manage legal cases and track their status
legal.legalCases.description.translation: Administrer juridiske sager og spor deres status

gps.fleetMap.description.en: Real-time tracking of sales officers and delivery vehicles
gps.fleetMap.description.translation: Sporing af salgsansvarlige og leveringskøretøjer i realtid

competitor.products.errors.createFailed.translation: Produktet kunne ikke oprettes. Prøv igen.

competitor.dashboard.description.en: Analytics and insights on competitor products
competitor.dashboard.description.translation: Analyse og indsigt i konkurrenternes produkter

crm.domain.customer360.description.en: Complete customer profiles, interaction history, and relationship management

crm.domain.campaigns.description.en: Multi-channel marketing campaigns (IG, FB, TikTok, WhatsApp)

crm.domain.leads.description.en: Lead management, qualification, and opportunity pipeline

crm.domain.support.description.en: Ticket management, customer service, and issue resolution

crm.domain.loyalty.description.en: Retailer loyalty, gamification, and rewards management

crm.customerList.customerManagementDescr.en: View and manage your customer relationships, interactions, and campaigns.
crm.customerList.customerManagementDescr.translation: Se og administrer dine kunderelationer, interaktioner og kampagner.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action1.en: Confirm upcoming shipments and update GRN schedule.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action1.translation: Bekræft kommende forsendelser og opdater GRN-planen.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action2.en: Review outstanding invoices and share payment advice.
supplierPortal.dashboard.action2.translation: Gennemgå udestående fakturaer og del betalingsråd.

supplierPortal.dashboard.action3.en: Resolve open quality complaints with QA evidence.

form.emailInvalid.en: Please enter a valid email address

faq.products.a1.en: We offer a wide range of premium food products including confectionery, beverages, snacks, pasta, bakery items, and frozen foods across multiple categories.
faq.products.a1.translation: Vi tilbyder et bredt udvalg af premium fødevarer, herunder konfekture, drikkevarer, snacks, pasta, bagværk og frostvarer på tværs af flere kategorier.

faq.products.q2.en: Where can I buy Harvics products?
faq.products.q2.translation: Hvor kan jeg købe Harvics produkter?

faq.products.a2.en: Our products are available in retail stores across 40+ countries. Use our store locator or contact page to find a retailer near you.
faq.products.a2.translation: Vores produkter er tilgængelige i detailbutikker i over 40 lande. Brug vores butiksfinder eller kontaktside for at finde en forhandler i nærheden af dig.

faq.products.a3.en: Yes, we offer bulk order discounts for businesses and retailers. Visit our Bulk Order Discounts page for more information.
faq.products.a3.translation: Ja, vi tilbyder rabatter på store ordrer til virksomheder og detailhandlere. Besøg vores side om rabatter på store ordrer for at få flere oplysninger.

faq.ordersShipping.a1.en: We offer various shipping options including standard, express, and international shipping. Free shipping is available on orders over $50.
faq.ordersShipping.a1.translation: Vi tilbyder forskellige forsendelsesmuligheder, herunder standard-, ekspres- og international forsendelse. Gratis fragt er tilgængelig på ordrer over $50.

faq.ordersShipping.a2.en: Delivery times vary by location. Standard delivery typically takes 5-7 business days, while express delivery takes 2-3 business days.
faq.ordersShipping.a2.translation: Leveringstiderne varierer afhængigt af lokationen. Standardlevering tager typisk 5-7 hverdage, mens ekspreslevering tager 2-3 hverdage.

faq.ordersShipping.a3.en: Yes, you can track your order using the tracking number provided in your order confirmation email.
faq.ordersShipping.a3.translation: Ja, du kan spore din ordre ved hjælp af sporingsnummeret i din ordrebekræftelsesmail.

faq.accountPayments.q1.en: How do I create an account?

faq.accountPayments.a1.en: Click on "Sign In" in the header and select "Create Account" to register for a new account.
faq.accountPayments.a1.translation: Klik på "Log ind" i overskriften, og vælg "Opret konto" for at oprette en ny konto.

faq.accountPayments.q2.en: What payment methods do you accept?

faq.accountPayments.a2.en: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for B2B orders.
faq.accountPayments.a2.translation: Vi accepterer alle større kreditkort, debetkort, PayPal og bankoverførsler til B2B-ordrer.

faq.accountPayments.a3.en: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your payment information.
faq.accountPayments.a3.translation: Ja, vi bruger branchestandardkryptering til at beskytte dine betalingsoplysninger.

faq.returnsRefunds.a1.en: We offer a 30-day return policy for unopened products in original packaging. Please contact our customer service for return authorization.
faq.returnsRefunds.a1.translation: Vi tilbyder 30 dages returret på uåbnede produkter i original emballage. Kontakt venligst vores kundeservice for at få godkendt returneringen.

faq.returnsRefunds.q2.en: How do I request a refund?

faq.returnsRefunds.a2.en: Contact our customer service team with your order number and reason for return. We will process your refund within 5-7 business days.
faq.returnsRefunds.a2.translation: Kontakt vores kundeserviceteam med dit ordrenummer og årsagen til returneringen. Vi behandler din refusion inden for 5-7 hverdage.

faq.contactCta.subtitle.en: Our customer service team is here to help
faq.contactCta.subtitle.translation: Vores kundeserviceteam er her for at hjælpe

careers.description.en: Join Harvics Global Ventures — explore opportunities across 40+ countries.
careers.description.translation: Bliv en del af Harvics Global Ventures — udforsk muligheder i over 40 lande.

careers.heroTitle.en: Build the Future of Global Trade

careers.heroDesc.en: We're growing across 40+ countries. Join a team that's building the AI-powered operating system for global commerce.
careers.heroDesc.translation: Vi vokser i over 40 lande. Bliv en del af et team, der bygger det AI-drevne operativsystem til global handel.

careers.departments.sales.desc.en: Drive revenue across 40+ markets. Territory management, key accounts, distributor relations.
careers.departments.sales.desc.translation: Øg omsætningen på tværs af over 40 markeder. Områdestyring, nøglekunder, distributørrelationer.

careers.departments.supplyChain.desc.en: End-to-end supply chain from factory to shelf. Fleet management, warehousing, last-mile delivery.
careers.departments.supplyChain.desc.translation: End-to-end forsyningskæde fra fabrik til hylde. Flådestyring, lagerstyring, levering til sidste kilometer.

careers.departments.technology.desc.en: Build Harvics OS — our AI-powered enterprise platform. Full-stack, ML engineering, data science.
careers.departments.technology.desc.translation: Byg Harvics OS — vores AI-drevne virksomhedsplatform. Full-stack, ML-udvikling, datalogi.

careers.departments.finance.desc.en: Multi-currency treasury, trade finance, HPay digital payments, FX management across regions.
careers.departments.finance.desc.translation: Multi-valuta treasury, handelsfinansiering, digitale HPay-betalinger, valutastyring på tværs af regioner.

careers.departments.procurement.desc.en: Global sourcing from 15+ origin countries. Supplier audits, quality control, factory-direct programs.
careers.departments.procurement.desc.translation: Global sourcing fra over 15 oprindelseslande. Leverandørrevisioner, kvalitetskontrol, fabriks-direkte-programmer.

careers.departments.hr.desc.en: Talent acquisition, L&D, performance management across diverse geographies and cultures.
careers.departments.hr.desc.translation: Talentrekruttering, L&D og performance management på tværs af forskellige geografiske områder og kulturer.

careers.departments.legal.desc.en: Trade compliance, sanctions screening, IP protection, contract management across jurisdictions.
careers.departments.legal.desc.translation: Handelsoverholdelse, sanktionsscreening, IP-beskyttelse, kontraktstyring på tværs af jurisdiktioner.

careers.departments.marketing.desc.en: Multi-language campaigns, 38-locale content, digital marketing, brand strategy for 10 verticals.
careers.departments.marketing.desc.translation: Flersprogede kampagner, indhold med 38 sprogindstillinger, digital markedsføring, brandstrategi for 10 vertikaler.

careers.benefits.globalMobility.desc.en: Work across Dubai, London, Karachi, Lahore, and 40+ markets
careers.benefits.globalMobility.desc.translation: Arbejd i Dubai, London, Karachi, Lahore og over 40 markeder

careers.benefits.growthTrack.desc.en: Fast-track career progression in a scaling enterprise
careers.benefits.growthTrack.desc.translation: Hurtig karriereudvikling i en skalerende virksomhed

careers.benefits.aiCulture.desc.en: Work with cutting-edge AI and real-time intelligence systems
careers.benefits.aiCulture.desc.translation: Arbejd med banebrydende AI og realtids-intelligenssystemer

careers.benefits.learningBudget.desc.en: Annual development budget for courses, conferences, and certifications
careers.benefits.learningBudget.desc.translation: Årligt udviklingsbudget for kurser, konferencer og certificeringer

careers.benefits.flexibleWork.desc.en: Hybrid arrangements with regional hub offices worldwide
careers.benefits.flexibleWork.desc.translation: Hybride aftaler med regionale hub-kontorer verden over

strategy.description.en: Building a sustainable future through innovation and excellence
strategy.description.translation: At bygge en bæredygtig fremtid gennem innovation og ekspertise

strategy.heroSubtitle.en: Building a sustainable future through innovation and excellence
strategy.heroSubtitle.translation: At bygge en bæredygtig fremtid gennem innovation og ekspertise

strategy.pillars.globalExpansion.desc.en: Expanding our presence in emerging markets while strengthening our position in established markets
strategy.pillars.globalExpansion.desc.translation: Udvidelse af vores tilstedeværelse i vækstmarkeder og samtidig styrkelse af vores position i etablerede markeder

strategy.pillars.productInnovation.desc.en: Investing in R&D to develop new products that meet evolving consumer preferences
strategy.pillars.productInnovation.desc.translation: Investering i forskning og udvikling for at udvikle nye produkter, der imødekommer skiftende forbrugerpræferencer

strategy.pillars.sustainability.desc.en: Committed to sustainable practices across our supply chain and operations
strategy.pillars.sustainability.desc.translation: Forpligtet til bæredygtige praksisser på tværs af vores forsyningskæde og drift

strategy.pillars.digitalTransformation.d.en: Leveraging technology to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency
strategy.pillars.digitalTransformation.d.translation: Udnyttelse af teknologi til at forbedre kundeoplevelsen og driftseffektiviteten

strategy.vision.desc.en: To be the world's leading premium consumer goods company, recognized for quality, innovation, and sustainability.
strategy.vision.desc.translation: At være verdens førende virksomhed inden for premium forbrugsvarer, anerkendt for kvalitet, innovation og bæredygtighed.

seo.home.title.en: Harvics Global Ventures | Premium Global Trading
seo.home.title.translation: Harvics Global Ventures | Premium Global Trading

seo.home.description.en: Leading global trading company delivering premium products across 10+ industries. Operating in 50+ countries since 2019.
seo.home.description.translation: Førende global handelsvirksomhed, der leverer premiumprodukter på tværs af over 10 brancher. Har opereret i over 50 lande siden 2019.

seo.about.description.en: Discover how Harvics Global Ventures became a leading force in global trade across 40+ countries and 10 industries.
seo.about.description.translation: Opdag hvordan Harvics Global Ventures blev en førende kraft inden for global handel på tværs af mere end 40 lande og 10 brancher.

seo.contact.description.en: Get in touch with Harvics offices worldwide across the Middle East, South Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas.
seo.contact.description.translation: Kontakt Harvics kontorer verden over i Mellemøsten, Sydasien, Europa, Afrika og Amerika.

seo.products.description.en: Explore Harvics premium product range across FMCG, textiles, commodities, and industrial solutions.
seo.products.description.translation: Udforsk Harvics premium-produktsortiment på tværs af FMCG, tekstiler, råvarer og industrielle løsninger.

seo.careers.description.en: Join Harvics Global Ventures — explore opportunities across 40+ countries in FMCG, textiles, logistics, and technology.
seo.careers.description.translation: Bliv en del af Harvics Global Ventures — udforsk muligheder i over 40 lande inden for FMCG, tekstiler, logistik og teknologi.

seo.media.description.en: Harvics media center — press releases, latest news, brand assets, and media contacts.
seo.media.description.translation: Harvics mediecenter — pressemeddelelser, seneste nyheder, brandaktiver og mediekontakter.

seo.strategy.description.en: Harvics strategic vision for global expansion, innovation, sustainability, and digital transformation.
seo.strategy.description.translation: Harvics strategiske vision for global ekspansion, innovation, bæredygtighed og digital transformation.

seo.csr.description.en: Harvics CSR initiatives — environmental stewardship, community programs, and ethical business practices.
seo.csr.description.translation: Harvics CSR-initiativer — miljøforvaltning, samfundsprogrammer og etiske forretningspraksisser.

seo.faq.title.translation: Ofte stillede spørgsmål | Harvics Global Ventures

seo.faq.description.en: Frequently asked questions about Harvics products, services, ordering, and global operations.
seo.faq.description.translation: Ofte stillede spørgsmål om Harvics produkter, tjenester, bestilling og globale operationer.

seo.locations.description.en: Harvics offices and operations across the Middle East, South Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Americas.
seo.locations.description.translation: Harvics kontorer og operationer i Mellemøsten, Sydasien, Europa, Afrika og Amerika.

seo.leadership.description.en: Meet the leadership team driving Harvics Global Ventures across 40+ markets and 10 industry verticals.
seo.leadership.description.translation: Mød lederteamet, der driver Harvics Global Ventures på tværs af mere end 40 markeder og 10 brancher.

seo.help.description.en: Get help with orders, accounts, shipping, and Harvics services.
seo.help.description.translation: Få hjælp med ordrer, konti, forsendelse og Harvics-tjenester.

seo.compliance.description.en: Harvics commitment to regulatory compliance, ethical business practices, and global standards.
seo.compliance.description.translation: Harvics forpligtelse til overholdelse af lovgivningen, etisk forretningspraksis og globale standarder.

seo.history.description.en: From a Dubai startup in 2019 to a global enterprise spanning 40+ countries — the Harvics story.
seo.history.description.translation: Fra en startup i Dubai i 2019 til en global virksomhed i over 40 lande — Harvics' historie.

seo.newsletter.description.en: Subscribe to Harvics newsletter for industry insights and product launches.
seo.newsletter.description.translation: Tilmeld dig Harvics nyhedsbrev for at få brancheindsigt og produktlanceringer.

seo.login.description.en: Sign in to your Harvics account to manage orders and access the platform.
seo.login.description.translation: Log ind på din Harvics-konto for at administrere ordrer og få adgang til platformen.

seo.research.description.en: Harvics research initiatives and innovation programs driving our global strategy.
seo.research.description.translation: Harvics forskningsinitiativer og innovationsprogrammer, der driver vores globale strategi.

seo.investorRelations.description.en: Investor information, financial reports, and corporate announcements from Harvics Global Ventures.

errors.notFound.description.en: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.notFound.description.translation: Den side, du leder efter, findes ikke eller er blevet flyttet.

errors.serverError.description.en: We are sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try refreshing the page.
errors.serverError.description.translation: Vi beklager, men der skete noget uventet. Prøv venligst at opdatere siden.

errors.globalError.description.en: A critical error occurred. Please reload the page.
errors.globalError.description.translation: Der opstod en kritisk fejl. Genindlæs siden.
